'''Bartru and the Blaster Rays''' was a [[Music/Legends|musical]] [[Band/Legends|group]] that was based on the [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Celanon/Legends|Celanon]]. The band was apparently led by a [[Devaronian/Legends|Devaronian]].
